final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a young woman in a denim jacket leaning against neon signs on a 1990s Hong Kong street at night.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography, vintage Hong Kong cinema aesthetic, heavy grain texture, Wong Kar-wai inspired mood
Composition: medium shot, slightly low angle, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field with neon bokeh in background
Subject: young woman in oversized denim jacket, relaxed leaning pose against wall, casual 90s hairstyle, contemplative expression
Scene/backdrop: narrow Hong Kong street at night, dense neon signage in Chinese characters, wet pavement reflecting lights, urban density
Lighting/mood: mixed neon glow from multiple signs, warm tungsten and cool fluorescent clash, hazy atmospheric depth, nostalgic melancholy
Color palette: warm amber and orange from neon as dominant, cool cyan and magenta as accents, muted shadows with lifted blacks
Materials/textures: visible film grain, soft focus edges, glossy wet street surface, worn denim fabric texture
Avoid: digital sharpness, clean modern look, oversaturated colors, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, plastic skin smoothing
